name: Vedhin Govind
summary: Full-stack developer with expertise in Java, Python, and JavaScript, specializing in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). Experienced in architecting and deploying scalable web applications, including an AI-powered news platform and a comprehensive hotel management system. Proven ability to optimize application performance, implement secure authentication, and integrate third-party APIs. Demonstrates strong leadership and mentoring skills through roles as President of the Web Club and as a student mentor.

projects.title: Hotel Management Portal
bullets: Architected a full-stack hotel management system with secure authentication and dynamic routing, serving 100+ listings and 500+ user reviews.
Engineered robust MongoDB schemas and RESTful APIs with middleware validation, ensuring 99% uptime and seamless data integrity.
Optimized database queries and implemented caching strategies, improving application response time by 35%.

projects.title: Business Digest – AI-Powered Briefing Engine
bullets: Spearheaded development of an AI-powered news aggregation platform, integrating Groq LLM and GNews API to deliver personalized business insights.
Architected a secure backend infrastructure with Node.js and MongoDB, implementing OAuth authentication via Passport.js for 500+ users.
Designed scalable RESTful APIs supporting a React + TypeScript frontend, enabling real-time competitor analysis and trend forecasting.

projects.title: Community Crop Exchange Platform
bullets: Engineered a collaborative agricultural platform connecting 200+ farmers, reducing crop wastage by 40% through optimized resource sharing.
Implemented a WebSocket-based real-time communication system, accelerating trade negotiations by 60%.
Developed location-aware filtering algorithms and secure authentication protocols to streamline resource discovery.
Spearheaded technical initiatives, orchestrating 10+ workshops and hackathons that enhanced web development skills for over 700 students.
Forged strategic partnerships with industry professionals and faculty to secure mentorship opportunities and real-world project exposure for club members.
Mentored over 40 first-year students in C programming fundamentals, developing a comprehensive curriculum that improved coding proficiency by 85%.
